references.title: AVA starter shock and modal screening guidance placeholder
references.citation: Internal AVA starter knowledge placeholder; replace with governing source records before release use.
references.availability: internal placeholder only
references.notes: This placeholder marks uncited starter theory so AVA does not present it as externally sourced knowledge.

references.title: ASTM E90-23, Standard Test Method for Laboratory Measurement of Airborne Sound Transmission Loss of Building Partitions and Elements
references.citation: ASTM International. ASTM E90-23, Standard Test Method for Laboratory Measurement of Airborne Sound Transmission Loss of Building Partitions and Elements.
references.availability: official metadata page; full standard is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Use for identifying the governing ASTM method. Do not ingest or quote standard text unless the user provides licensed content.

references.title: ISO 10140-2:2021, Acoustics - Laboratory measurement of sound insulation of building elements - Part 2: Measurement of airborne sound insulation
references.citation: ISO 10140-2:2021, Acoustics - Laboratory measurement of sound insulation of building elements - Part 2: Measurement of airborne sound insulation.
references.availability: official metadata page; full standard is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Use as the ISO counterpart for airborne insulation laboratory measurement. ISO 10140 has multiple parts; Part 2 is the direct airborne measurement method.

references.title: ISO 10140-5:2021, Acoustics - Laboratory measurement of sound insulation of building elements - Part 5: Requirements for test facilities and equipment
references.citation: ISO 10140-5:2021, Acoustics - Laboratory measurement of sound insulation of building elements - Part 5: Requirements for test facilities and equipment.
references.availability: official metadata page; full standard is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Related to ISO 10140-2 because facility and equipment requirements control validity of measurement results.

references.title: ISO 1996-1:2016, Acoustics - Description, measurement and assessment of environmental noise - Part 1: Basic quantities and assessment procedures
references.citation: ISO 1996-1:2016, Acoustics - Description, measurement and assessment of environmental noise - Part 1: Basic quantities and assessment procedures.
references.availability: official metadata page; full standard is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Use for environmental noise quantity and assessment terminology. Pair with ISO 1996-2 when measurement procedure detail is needed.

references.title: ISO 1996-2:2017, Acoustics - Description, measurement and assessment of environmental noise - Part 2: Determination of sound pressure levels
references.citation: ISO 1996-2:2017, Acoustics - Description, measurement and assessment of environmental noise - Part 2: Determination of sound pressure levels.
references.availability: official metadata page; full standard is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Related measurement procedure standard for environmental-noise workflows.

references.title: ISO 9613-2:2024, Acoustics - Attenuation of sound during propagation outdoors - Part 2: Engineering method for the prediction of sound pressure levels outdoors
references.citation: ISO 9613-2:2024, Acoustics - Attenuation of sound during propagation outdoors - Part 2: Engineering method for the prediction of sound pressure levels outdoors.
references.availability: official metadata page; full standard is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Use as the current ISO outdoor propagation method reference. The 2024 edition supersedes the older 1996 edition.

references.title: IEC 61260-1:2014, Electroacoustics - Octave-band and fractional-octave-band filters - Part 1: Specifications
references.citation: IEC 61260-1:2014, Electroacoustics - Octave-band and fractional-octave-band filters - Part 1: Specifications.
references.availability: official metadata page; full standard is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Use as the governing standard for octave and fractional-octave filter specifications.

references.title: ISO 18431-4:2007, Mechanical vibration and shock - Signal processing - Part 4: Shock-response spectrum analysis
references.citation: ISO 18431-4:2007, Mechanical vibration and shock - Signal processing - Part 4: Shock-response spectrum analysis.
references.availability: official metadata page; full standard is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Use as the formal SRS signal-processing standard. Official metadata says this edition was confirmed in 2021.

references.title: ASTM E1049-85(2017), Standard Practices for Cycle Counting in Fatigue Analysis
references.citation: ASTM International. ASTM E1049-85(2017), Standard Practices for Cycle Counting in Fatigue Analysis.
references.availability: official metadata page; full standard is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Useful companion reference for FDS/FDET workflows because time-domain damage calculations rely on cycle counting.

references.title: Noise and Vibration Control Engineering: Principles and Applications, Second Edition
references.citation: Ver, I. L., and Beranek, L. L., eds. Noise and Vibration Control Engineering: Principles and Applications, Second Edition. Wiley, 2006. DOI: 10.1002/9780470172568.
references.availability: official publisher metadata; book content is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Use as a high-authority textbook citation after specific claims are checked against licensed text.

references.title: Structure-Borne Sound: Structural Vibrations and Sound Radiation at Audio Frequencies, Third Edition
references.citation: Cremer, L., Heckl, M., and Petersson, B. A. T. Structure-Borne Sound: Structural Vibrations and Sound Radiation at Audio Frequencies, Third Edition. Springer, 2005. DOI: 10.1007/b137728.
references.availability: official publisher metadata; book content is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Use as a high-authority structure-borne sound citation after specific claims are checked against licensed text.

references.title: Sound and Structural Vibration: Radiation, Transmission and Response, Second Edition
references.citation: Fahy, F., and Gardonio, P. Sound and Structural Vibration: Radiation, Transmission and Response, Second Edition. Academic Press, 2007.
references.availability: repository metadata page; record has no downloadable full text
references.notes: Use as a high-authority vibroacoustics citation after specific claims are checked against licensed text.

references.title: Random Data: Analysis and Measurement Procedures, Fourth Edition
references.citation: Bendat, J. S., and Piersol, A. G. Random Data: Analysis and Measurement Procedures, Fourth Edition. Wiley, 2010. DOI: 10.1002/9781118032428.
references.availability: official publisher metadata; book content is copyrighted/paywalled
references.notes: Core theory reference for random vibration signal processing and spectral-estimation claims.

references.title: Noise reduction by screens
references.citation: Maekawa, Z. Noise reduction by screens. Applied Acoustics, 1(3), 157-173, 1968. DOI: 10.1016/0003-682X(68)90020-0.
references.availability: publisher abstract and metadata; full article access depends on subscription
references.notes: Use as a foundational noise-barrier citation. Do not reproduce proprietary charts or full text.

references.title: Fatigue Damage Related Descriptor for Random Vibration Test Environments
references.citation: Henderson, G. R., and Piersol, A. G. Fatigue Damage Related Descriptor for Random Vibration Test Environments. Sound and Vibration, 29(10), 20-24, 1995.
references.availability: bibliographic record; full article availability not confirmed
references.notes: Foundational damage-potential reference. Treat claims as citation candidates until article text is available.

references.title: Implementing the Fatigue Damage Spectrum and Fatigue Damage Equivalent Vibration Testing
references.citation: McNeill, S. I. Implementing the Fatigue Damage Spectrum and Fatigue Damage Equivalent Vibration Testing. 79th Shock and Vibration Symposium, Orlando, Florida, October 26-30, 2008.
references.availability: public PDF hosted by Vibrationdata
references.notes: High-priority ingestion candidate for FDS/FDET workflows. Verify any equations against the PDF before promoting rules.

references.title: Improved recursive formula for calculating shock response spectra
references.citation: Smallwood, D. O. Improved recursive formula for calculating shock response spectra. Sandia National Laboratories, SAND-80-1315C; CONF-801033-1, 1980.
references.availability: OSTI bibliographic record; digital full text not available from OSTI record
references.notes: Authoritative SRS algorithm reference. OSTI metadata states the key ramp-invariant improvement but does not provide full text.

references.title: An Introduction to the Vibration Response Spectrum, Revision D
references.citation: Irvine, T. An Introduction to the Vibration Response Spectrum, Revision D. Vibrationdata, June 16, 2009.
references.availability: public PDF hosted by Vibrationdata
references.notes: Useful implementation/tutorial source. Treat as supporting guidance rather than governing standard.

references.title: An Introduction to Shock and Vibration Response Spectra, Revision H
references.citation: Irvine, T. An Introduction to Shock and Vibration Response Spectra, Revision H. Vibrationdata, 2023.
references.availability: public research profile record and PDF availability reported by ResearchGate
references.notes: Useful broad tutorial source. Prefer ISO 18431-4 for formal SRS calculation requirements.

references.title: MIL-STD-810G Method 517.1, Pyroshock
references.citation: U.S. Department of Defense. MIL-STD-810G Method 517.1, Pyroshock, 2008.
references.availability: public method PDF copy; verify current official status through ASSIST/DLA when contractual compliance matters
references.notes: Use for historical G-revision Method 517 context. Current programs may require MIL-STD-810H or contract-specific tailoring.

references.title: MIL-STD-810H Method 517.3, Pyroshock
references.citation: U.S. Department of Defense. MIL-STD-810H Method 517.3, Pyroshock, 2019.
references.availability: public method PDF copy; verify current official status through ASSIST/DLA when contractual compliance matters
references.notes: Related current-revision method for pyroshock testing and contaminated data checks.

references.title: NASA-STD-7003A, Pyroshock Test Criteria
references.citation: NASA-STD-7003A, Pyroshock Test Criteria. NASA Technical Standard, December 20, 2011.
references.availability: public PDF hosted by NASA GSFC
references.notes: High-priority ingestion candidate for NASA pyroshock criteria. NASA material is public-release but verify whether a program invokes a newer revision.

references.title: NASA-HDBK-7005, Dynamic Environmental Criteria
references.citation: NASA-HDBK-7005, Dynamic Environmental Criteria. NASA Technical Handbook, March 13, 2001.
references.availability: public PDF copy; NASA standards pages also reference the handbook
references.notes: High-priority ingestion candidate for aerospace dynamic-environment terminology and criteria development.

references.title: Using the Saturn V and Titan III Vibroacoustic Databanks for Random Vibration Criteria Development
references.citation: Ferebee, R. C. Using the Saturn V and Titan III Vibroacoustic Databanks for Random Vibration Criteria Development. NASA/TM-2009-215902, July 2009.
references.availability: public NTRS record and PDF download
references.notes: High-priority ingestion candidate for vibroacoustic databank and random vibration criteria development workflows.

references.title: Application of a computerized vibroacoustic data bank for random vibration criteria development
references.citation: Ferebee, R. C. Application of a computerized vibroacoustic data bank for random vibration criteria development. NASA-TP-1998, March 1982.
references.availability: public NTRS record and PDF download
references.notes: Related historical NASA source behind NASA/TM-2009-215902.

references.title: Damage Based Assessment overview presentation
references.citation: NASA. Damage Based Assessment overview presentation, NTRS record 20170010183.
references.availability: public NTRS PDF
references.notes: Useful NASA-facing overview that cites McNeill, ISO 18431-4, ASTM E1049, and Bendat/Piersol.

references.title: Simplified Vibration PSD Synthesis Method for MIL-STD-810
references.citation: Jang, J. Simplified Vibration PSD Synthesis Method for MIL-STD-810. Applied Sciences 10(2), 458, 2020.
references.availability: open access article
references.notes: Useful modern open-access implementation reference. It is not a governing standard.

references.title: Acoustic Toolbox IEC 61260-1:2014 implementation notes
references.citation: Acoustic Toolbox documentation, IEC 61260-1:2014 standard functions.
references.availability: public software documentation
references.notes: Useful for implementing band-center calculations. Cite IEC 61260-1 for governing requirements.
